title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!
